title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with a single click while automating both the control plane and data plane. It includes built-in features like Karpenter-based auto-scaling, cost optimization, and support for AI workloads at scale.
